overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a trench coat and fedora walking through a 1960s-style urban environment on an overcast day with wet streets. The character moves along city sidewalks past neoclassical architecture and commercial buildings, crossing streets and navigating around period-appropriate vehicles and pedestrians.

events.description: passing a red telephone booth on the left sidewalk
crossing the asphalt street toward the classical building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past commercial storefronts, approaching a large neoclassical building

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress carrying a black umbrella walking past the character

entered.detail: large neoclassical building with tall ionic columns and a green copper dome
row of ground-level storefronts with fabric awnings and signage
traditional red telephone booth with glass panels and 'TELEPHONE' signage
mature deciduous trees planted along the curb in square planters

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet commercial sidewalk with shops lining the right side. A prominent classical courthouse building with columns dominates the view ahead. The character passes a red telephone booth and crosses the street, encountering a pedestrian with an umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: civic building plaza with manicured lawn

events.description: moving from commercial street to the plaza area beside the classical courthouse
turning left at the corner of the courthouse onto a perpendicular street

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the courthouse building, passing pedestrians on the grass lawn, then turning the corner

notable_agents.action: two men in work clothes standing and conversing on the grass lawn

entered.detail: well-maintained green grass area between the sidewalk and the courthouse foundation
multi-story red brick industrial building with large grid windows

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the side of the classical courthouse, with a grass lawn and scattered pedestrians on the right. The camera turns left at the building corner, revealing a new street with brick industrial architecture ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with mixed commercial and office buildings

events.description: waiting near the curb as vintage cars drive past on the wet street
approaching a large intersection with a modern white building visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past groups of pedestrians and parked vintage cars, navigating toward a busy intersection

notable_agents.action: man in suspenders and flat cap walking alongside the character
man holding a black umbrella standing near a parked yellow sedan

entered.detail: tall white modernist building with clean geometric lines visible at the street end

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a busier sidewalk lined with parked cars and brick buildings. More pedestrians are visible, including men in period clothing. The camera approaches an intersection with a distinctive modern white building rising in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet urban landscape that shifts from a classical civic center to a busier industrial district. It begins with the character walking along a commercial sidewalk past shops and a red telephone booth, crossing the street toward a prominent courthouse with towering columns. As the character moves along the side of the courthouse and its adjacent grass lawn, the camera turns left at the building's corner to reveal a transition toward brick industrial architecture. The scene then expands into a more crowded street lined with parked cars and pedestrians in period clothing before finally approaching an intersection where a modern white building rises in the distance.
